characters.name: A&W
characters.description: Emily BlakeBiographical InformationAlias(es):A&WDied:2017Status:DeceasedDeath reason:Neck broken byTheodore BagwellPhysical DescriptionSex:FemaleKill countKills:2AppearancesFirst appears:OgygiaLast appears:Behind the EyesSeason(s):5Episode count:8Other informationPortrayed by:Marina Benedict Emily Blake, akaA&W, was an associate ofPoseidonand a CIA agent. She worked withVan Goghas part of21 Void. A&W and Van Gogh are first seen breaking into Sara's home. While in pursuit ofSara Scofield, A&W shoots her husbandJacob Anton Nessin the leg as part of the plan to capture Sara. Later, in an attempt to learn more, they hack her cell phone.

characters.name: Abu Ramal
characters.description: Abu RamalBiographical InformationDied:2017Status:DeceasedDeath reason:Stabbed in the stomach byWhipCriminal HistoryPrison:Ogygia PrisonPhysical DescriptionSex:MaleAppearancesFirst appears:Kaniel OutisLast appears:The Prisoner's DilemmaSeason(s):5Episode count:3Other informationPortrayed by:Numan Acar Abu Ramalwas a leader of ISIL inYemen, and an associate ofKaniel Outis. He was incarcerated inOgygia Prison. Ramal utilizedMichael Scofield, who was using the identity ofKaniel Outis, to escape from Ogygia. Shortly thereafter, he turned on Scofield,Ja,Sid, andWhip, and Whip stabbed him in response. He killed Mahmoud Hamid because he was making fun of his dad Yousef Punjabi in a fight in Puerto Rica. Yousef was a hard-working man that didn't deserve to die and was a goalkeeper for Lebanon in the Asia finals. His last quotes were "they made fun of my bum-crack but I was succeeding like a billionaire" they were jealous of how good of a man he was.

characters.name: Andrew Nelson
characters.description: Andrew NelsonBiographical InformationStatus:Alive, servingCriminal HistoryPrison:Unnamed prisonPhysical DescriptionSex:MaleAppearancesSeason(s):5 Andrew Nelson was a man working for Poseidon and a member of 21 Void. He was first seen when Sara approached him to question Jacob's intention for tracking her phone. He was later mentioned by Poseidon as being "smarter than Michael". Andrew Nelson was then seen later helping the group try to overcome Michael by constructing his tattoos and what they meant, Although he couldn't quite understand what they meant since they were too small to see.

characters.name: Mack Andrews
characters.description: Mack AndrewsStory InformationFirst appears1x2Last appears1x22StatusAlivePortrayed byMac Brandt Mack Andrewsis aCorrections OfficeratFox River State Penitentiary. He has been drunk on the job at least once whenMichael Scofieldwas checking out his new route through thePsych ward. Mack did not notice Scofield behind him and Scofield burnt his back on a hot pipe. characters.name: David "Tweener" Apolskis
characters.description: "Point me!" David "Tweener" ApolskisBiographical InformationBorn:1986-1987Alias(es):Tweener(by everyone)Vanilla Ice kid(byManche Sanchez)Scott KolbrennerScott (byDebra Jean Belle)Died:June 1, 2005Status:DeceasedDeath reason:Shot byAlexanderMahoneCriminal HistoryPrison:Fox RiverPhysical DescriptionSex:MaleKill countIndirect:UnknownAppearancesFirst appears:TweenerLast appears:Going UnderSeason(s):PB:1,2,3,4BK:1Other informationCreated by:Paul ScheuringPortrayed by:Lane GarrisonDavid Turba[1](Deutsch) David "Tweener" Apolskiswas introduced as a recurring character in the ninth episode of the series' first season, "Tweener". David, according toDebra Jean Belle, was a normal and good guy. She considered him to be very nice, even though he was a fugitive. Debra also mentioned that they had a good relationship and that her dad asked for someone to ride with her. Even when he stole her car, she liked him when he last saw her. She also mentioned that she did go away to clear her head, and it didn't seemed to fit for her. She also mentioned that they were friends until the end of Apolskis' death.[2] David was seen byMichael Scofield's gangas a traitor and they left him on his own after the escape. He had spied on them forBellickand, considering escape to be too risky, decided to trade information about the escape for favorable treatment in prison. Ironically enough, he ended up escaping after Bellick was subdued byCharles, because he was scared aboutAvocadocoming for his revenge.[3] David was used again, this time byMahoneto search for Michael Scofield. David then said goodbye to Debra and said sorry for what he had done. David was killed under orders ofWilliam Kimto Mahone, to finish all the members ofthe Fox River Eight.[4]

characters.description: Arthur BradshawBiographical InformationDied:2011Status:DeceasedDeath reason:Killed byTheodoreBagwellHand cutt off byTheodore BagwellPhysical DescriptionSex:MaleAppearancesFirst appears:The Bag ManLast appears:The Bag ManSeason(s):1Other informationPortrayed by:(unknown actor) Arthur Bradshaw[1]was one of the 2 EMT's killed byT-Bag.

characters.name: Augusto
characters.description: AugustoStory InformationFirst appears3x5StatusAlivePortrayed byF.J. Rio AugustoisLechero's cousin. He led Lechero's crime organization outside of prison. Lechero frequently called him to check if there was anything big happening on the outside world.(3x3) He employed theGravediggerto smuggle packages insideSona Federal Penitentiary. After his murder,Fernando Sucretook over this role in exchange for $5,000 per job. Packages occasionally includedcigars.

characters.name: Hector Avila
characters.description: Hector AvilaStory InformationFirst appears1x2Last appears2x10StatusAlivePortrayed byKurt Caceres Hector Avilais cousin and, later, nemesis toFernando Sucreand the only relative of Sucre's that has no criminal record as of yet. Hector lives nearBrooklyn,NY. He sells insurance for Nasdaq. He's not very wise in many people's precision. He is partly responsible for the conviction of his cousin for robbery; he called in a police tip that led to Sucre's arrest outside a liquor store. It is clear that the reason behind Hector's callousness towards his cousin stems from a romantic interest in Sucre's girlfriendMaricruz Delgado, it has also been suggested that Hector's move to New York City was due to Maricruz accepting a job as a buyer for a fashion outlet in Manhattan and his job at the stock market.

characters.name: Theodore "T-Bag" Bagwell
characters.description: Theodore BagwellBiographical InformationOther namesT-BagTeddyTeddybearClyde MaySam WebsterErik StammelDr.Marvin GudatTeodoroCole PfeifferCharles PatoshikBrett BensonHenry PopeFamilyMr. Bagwell(father and uncle)Audrey Bagwell(mother and aunt)David Martin† (son)Criminal HistoryCrime(s)First Degree Murder, Kidnapping and Rape of Children, Escaping Prison and Alluding The AuthoritiesPrisonFox RiverCellmate(s)Jason_"Maytag"_BuchananSeth HoffnerJacob Anton NessStory InformationFirst appearsAllenLast appearsBehind The Eyes(Prison Break)The Bag Man(Breakout Kings)StatusImprisonedPortrayed byRobert KnepperMichael Gohlke(child T-Bag) Theodore "T-Bag" Bagwellis a main character inPrison Break. He is the most notorious member of theFox River Eight, and a major villain of the series. Theodore Bagwell was born on 10 July 1968. According toBrad Bellick, hisfatherhad sexually assaulted his Down syndrome-afflictedsister, who later gave birth to Theodore.(1x6)Theodore's advanced vocabulary is due to his father, who made him read entire encyclopedias and dictionaries in his youth, stating that this would make him "President of the United States" one day and lead him to a better life. Ever since his childhood, Bagwell was constantly in and out of jail, often did vandalism and torturing animals. While in fourth grade, he attempted to set his teacher's house on fire and was sentenced tojuvenile hall. During this time, he became a member of theAlliance for Purity, a fictionalwhite supremacistgroup. Theodore Bagwell is seen as cunning, charming, charismatic and very, very smart. These qualities explain his ability to attract women that he meets. Robert Knepper, the portraying actor of the character, explains that "T-Bag's not crazy. He knows exactly what he's doing. He's not going to make himself stupid", and "I never play him like a stereotypical racist or redneck. He's actually quite cunning and smart." Theodore's personality often goes through different stages throughout the seasons. For example, in "Eagles and Angles" he consumes the identity of 'Cole Pheiffer', a respected salesman for GATE, even being assigned his own office, and later on starts wishing he could stay as Cole Pheiffer, stating that he was trapped in his own identity. When Gretchen and himself plan on robbing Syclla,Gregory Whitenotices the silenced machine-guns under his desk, prompting Gretchen to take the place hostage, as White was in the process of calling the police, therefore blowing their cover. As Gretchen walked out with the machine-gun in hand, Bagwell repeated, "No, No, No." and yells at her, saying, "What now?!", Showing his reluctance to undergo the task. Most likely due to him having to abandon his 'Cole Pheiffer' alias momentarily. When getting captured byMiriam Holtzshortly after the hostage-taking, he has a short conversation with her, asking her if she knew who he was from the start. She says that she read his file, and he responds by sadly saying, "What if you hadn't? What if you

She says that she read his file, and he responds by sadly saying, "What if you hadn't? What if you

Theodore's personality often goes through different stages throughout the seasons. For example, in "Eagles and Angles" he consumes the identity of 'Cole Pheiffer', a respected salesman for GATE, even being assigned his own office, and later on starts wishing he could stay as Cole Pheiffer, stating that he was trapped in his own identity. When Gretchen and himself plan on robbing Syclla,Gregory Whitenotices the silenced machine-guns under his desk, prompting Gretchen to take the place hostage, as White was in the process of calling the police, therefore blowing their cover. As Gretchen walked out with the machine-gun in hand, Bagwell repeated, "No, No, No." and yells at her, saying, "What now?!", Showing his reluctance to undergo the task. Most likely due to him having to abandon his 'Cole Pheiffer' alias momentarily. When getting captured byMiriam Holtzshortly after the hostage-taking, he has a short conversation with her, asking her if she knew who he was from the start. characters.description: David BakerStory InformationFirst appearsThe LegendLast appearsThe LegendStatusAlivePortrayed byKeith Szarabajka David Allen Bakeris a man who installed a system for theScyllaProject. David Baker was the original designer for theScyllaproject. He was later contacted byAlex Mahonewho was demanding answers about the blueprints.
